title: indie Semiconductor (INDI) Valuation and Financial Analysis
text: indie Semiconductor provides automotive semiconductors and software solutions for advanced driver assistance systems, autonomous vehicles, connected car, user experience, and electrification applications. The company has a market cap of $981.19 million with 226.60 million shares outstanding. In 2025, indie Semiconductor's revenue was $217.39 million, an increase of 0.33% compared to the previous year. In the last 12 months, INDI had revenue of $217.39 million and -$143.07 million in losses. Return on equity is -36.34% and return on invested capital is -11.36%. The company has $145.46 million in cash and $369.67 million in debt, with a net cash position of -$224.22 million. The average rating for INDI stock is Strong Buy with a 12-month stock price target of $6.19, representing an increase of 43.29% from the latest price. The latest twelve month free cash flow is a loss of about $71.3 million. indie Semiconductor currently trades on a P/S ratio of 4.14x, which is below the broader Semiconductor industry average P/S of 8.65x. The company's heavy concentration of revenue within the automotive sector exposes it to significant earnings volatility during industry downturns.
